prompt: Create a cinematic tabletop scene showing a manga/comic artwork in progress on a sheet of paper, viewed from a slightly overhead angle on a dark wooden desk. The page is split diagonally by a jagged glowing golden tear of sparks: the left half is a rough graphite pencil sketch, and the right half is the finished colored comic. On the left sketch side, draw an unfinished city skyline with tall skyscrapers and a lone caped hero seen from behind, all in loose construction lines, smudges, crosshatching, and eraser dust. On the right finished side, render a dramatic noir manga superhero scene in deep navy blues, black inks, halftone dots, warm yellow window lights, and crisp white panel borders: a silhouetted young male hero with spiky hair and a long flowing cape stands on a rooftop ledge facing a dense futuristic city under a large full moon and streaky clouds. The finished comic page contains exactly 4 visible panels: 1 large main panel with the hero overlooking the city, 2 narrow vertical panels stacked on the right showing dark city architecture and a rooftop water tower, and 1 wide bottom-right panel showing diagonal urban perspective lines and buildings. Add real art supplies around the page: exactly 1 sharpened pencil on the lower left, exactly 2 black drawing pens on the lower right, and 1 metal cup partially visible at the top right. Use dramatic warm desk lighting, realistic paper texture, ink grain, halftone print texture, glowing transition sparks, and high-detail comic linework. The scene should feel like a transformation from sketch to finished comic art. Customize the hero as spiky-haired caped young male vigilante, the setting as noir futuristic rooftop city, the comic palette as deep navy, black ink, warm yellow lights, and golden sparks, the moon detail as large full moon behind drifting clouds, and the desk style as dark wooden artist desk.
